selected_source.name: robosuite
selected_source.reason: robosuite provides MuJoCo benchmark manipulation environments; the selected Panda asset is composed inside the official Lift task with PandaGripper, table, cube, reward, grasp checks, collision and friction settings.

rejected_previous_candidate.name: MuJoCo Menagerie Franka Emika Panda
rejected_previous_candidate.reason: clean and simulation-ready, but not itself a task-validated grasp/lift asset with tuned task parameters.
